narrative:
Ottawa Twp. West (precinct in Putnam County) has 779 registered voters, with 48.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.5 percentage points.
